programme.title: Jaguh Kampung 3 - EP 9

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories - EP 2

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 12
programme.desc: Ikmal dan Mikail adalah anak angkat kepada Mona. Ikmal bekerja keras supaya Mikail mendapat pendidikan yang bagus di kolej. Namun Mikail terjerumus dengan pelbagai masalah akibat salah berkawan.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti - EP 7
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 14
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 17

programme.title: Bunga Hati - EP 20

programme.title: A Common Crime

programme.title: Yaara
programme.desc: A group of close friends who ran a ruthless criminal gang when they were young get separated due to several circumstances. When they reunite after many years, it is to help their friend in need. Release Year: 2020 Director: Tigmanshu Dhulia

programme.desc: A suicide bomber loses his memory and has a bomb attached to his heart. It is up to the police officers to prevent this bomb from taking innocent lives. Release Year: 2019 Director: Behzad Khambata

programme.title: Cesar Wagner - EP 8
programme.desc: Wagner attends his mother's wedding in a sumptuous stately home. But behind the scenes tragedy strikes: the body of an unknown man has been found in the cold room. As a favour to his mother, Wagner agrees not to insist that the celebration be cancelled and investigates with his team.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 12
programme.desc: Born in Sarajevo and arriving in Quebec as a child, Jelena fled the war in former Yugoslavia with her parents. Today an actress trained at the Conservatoire d'art dramatique de Quebec, she moves between stage, screen and artistic engagement, driven by a deeply multicultural journey.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: Following a colleague's sexual assault, Louise, a semi-skilled worker with a strong character, decides it's time to end the permanent ambiance of sexism and bullying that's reigned in their printing works for years. A veritable revolution that Louise and her female colleagues are determined to see through to the end.

programme.title: Fleuve En Eaux Troubles - EP 5
programme.desc: Decreasing levels of dissolved oxygen in the river's waters are affecting marine life. Researchers analyze the causes of this ecological crisis and explore possible actions.

A rapper and promoter of Congolese rumba, Badi is an engaged artist living in Brussels. Between studio sessions and international stages, he conveys a message of pride and resistance, grounding his lyrics in the memory and struggles of his roots.

programme.title: Conte-Nous ! - EP 3
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo - EP 3
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Demo De Mode - EP 1
programme.desc: Overshadowed by young girls dressed in haute couture... The designer Alexis Mabille presents his haute couture collection for the spring-summer 2024 season, a veritable ode to freshness and delicacy.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil

programme.title: Contact - EP 2
programme.desc: Daughter of an Italian immigrant and sociologist by training, she was the first woman in Quebec to be entrusted with a morning show. Today, a columnist in the written press and a television producer, Marie-France Bazzo looks back on her thirty-five-year career in the media.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Le Monde De Jamy - EP 2
programme.desc: Forests protect us from global warming by absorbing the CO2 we emit. But this precious resource is in danger, weakened in particular by heat and droughts. An investigation into the men and women who fight, sometimes at the risk of their lives, to save the forests.

programme.title: Le Monde De Jamy - EP 4
programme.desc: Habitat, transport, lighting... At a time when we face global warming and the need to save energy, animals often have the solution! They have learned to adapt to the most extreme environments and deploy incredible ingenuity to survive.

programme.title: Cosy, Le Mag Deco - EP 6
programme.desc: Caroline Boeglin goes in search of astonishing lodgings. She shares her love of finding objects in antique markets, her DIY ideas and her interior design touch that transforms a room. Decoration and renovation are the key words for her discoveries.

programme.title: Girl Power - Caroline Marx
programme.desc: Caroline Marx takes control and showcases her range of talents! In front of a family audience, amused and amazed, she performs ''quick-change'', mentalism, expert card manipulation, the Rubik's Cube and certain predictions...

programme.title: Serieux ? - EP 2
programme.desc: Mathieu visits one of Montreal's largest sewage treatment plants. Meanwhile, Marie-eve investigates how we can ''flush'' in a greener way, and tests a bidet for us!

programme.title: Cesar Wagner - EP 8
programme.desc: Wagner attends his mother's wedding in a sumptuous stately home. But behind the scenes tragedy strikes: the body of an unknown man has been found in the cold room. As a favour to his mother, Wagner agrees not to insist that the celebration be cancelled and investigates with his team.

programme.title: Secrets Des Profondeurs - EP 5
programme.desc: Mario and Sam try to discover the identity of a wreck lying at the bottom of the Saint Lawrence, between Levis and the Island of Orleans.

programme.title: Sports Life
programme.desc: Glíma, Iceland’s traditional Viking wrestling, is on the brink of extinction. programme.title: Movie - Priyamaana Thozhi
programme.desc: Ashok and Julie are childhood friends. Julie is set to marry Michael, a cricketer who is hoping to get selected in the Indian team, but her wedding plans are threatened when Ashok is selected instead.

programme.title: Movie - Achchamundu Achchamundu
programme.desc: Senthil and Malini live a content life in New Jersey with their ten-year-old daughter Rithika. However, trouble begins to brew when Robertson, a child predator, comes to paint their basement.

programme.title: Movie - Urchagam
programme.desc: Jency and Ganesh love each other, but she has to get married to Nicholas, a rich entrepreneur from London. He had financed her mother's surgery, so in gratitude, Jency agrees to marry him.

programme.title: Movie - Uthami
programme.desc: Uthami is a 1985 Indian Tamil-language film directed by M. Vellaichami, starring Sujatha, Rajesh and Sangeeta

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Vaidegi Kathirunthal
programme.desc: When Vaidehi and Vellaisamy meet, their lives undergo a drastic turn. They discover that they must join forces to save a young couple from the wrath of the villagers.

programme.title: Movie - Chirai Chaalai
programme.desc: In 1915 British India, Indian doctor Govardhan is falsely accused of bombing a train and sent to a cellular jail at Port Blair. He witnesses the extremely inhumane treatment meted out to the inmates.

programme.title: Movie - Sigappu Rojakkal
programme.desc: Finding it hard to put his dark past behind him, Samar grows to despise girls and indulges in women trafficking. Arrested and put in an asylum by the police, he falls for a demented lady prisoner.

programme.title: Movie - Sollamale
programme.desc: Shwetha, a rich and kind woman, assumes that Nadaraj cannot speak and shows empathy towards him. When their friendship blossoms into love, Nadaraj faces an arduous task of proving his love.

programme.title: Movie - Pithamagan
programme.desc: A young orphan grows up in a graveyard and is devoid of any human feelings; when he leaves the cemetery and meets people, he experiences emotions for the first time.

programme.title: Movie - Un Samayal Arayil
programme.desc: Kalidasan and Gowri are food lovers who get connected over a wrong phone call. Gradually, they develop feelings for each other but hide their true identities during their face-to-face meeting.

programme.title: Movie - Uyirthiru 420
programme.desc: A conman falls for the girl he was deceiving and decides to work as an honest man. While working in a hotel, he discovers that his boss is being troubled by a high profile man and plans to help him by conning the man.

programme.title: Movie - Vadugapatti Mapillai

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE FRENCH CONNECTION
programme.desc: A celebration of France's greatest football icons, featuring Thierry Henry, David Ginola, Robert Pires, Claude Makelele, Emmanuel Petit and many more.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 5
programme.desc: One year on from the tragic death of Diogo Jota and his brother Andre in a car accident, this deeply emotional PL Stories show celebrates the life of one of football's most loved figures. Through interviews with friends, teammates and coaches from Portugal to the Premier League, we look back on Jota's journey, the impact he had on those around him, and the legacy he left behind both on and off the pitch.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: Soaring Seagulls' tells the incredible story of Brighton & Hove Albion; from the brink of collapse and years in the lower leagues to becoming one of the Premier League's smartest and most admired clubs. Featuring interviews with the key figures behind Brighton's rise, alongside celebrity fans who followed every twist along the way, this documentary charts a remarkable journey of survival, ambition and one of the greatest comebacks in modern football.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We spend the day with Julian Dicks as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League's toughest and most uncompromising defenders. Best known for his time at West Ham United, Dicks looks back on the highs, rivalries and intensity of football in the 1990s, as well as the reputation that made him a cult hero with fans. Now coaching at Chelmsford City, we see a different side to the former hardman as he passes on his experience to the next generation, while reflecting on the moment

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 5
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Rodri, Viktor Gyökeres, Chris Wood and Daniel Munoz.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 5
programme.desc: Julia Stuart is joined by Ian Wright, Kolo Toure & Mikel John Obi to discuss the influence of African football on the Premier League.

programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards. Set against the backdrop of a physically demanding homeland that forged resilience and a relentless mentality, the story also weaves in the presence of Alf-Inge Haaland during that same era, creating a generation

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 6
programme.desc: We spend the day with Dean Ashton as he reflects on a career that promised so much and was cut short far too soon. From his rise through the Football League to becoming one of the Premier League's most exciting forwards with West Ham United, Ashton looks back on the goals, injuries and moments that shaped his journey in the game. Now working as a respected pundit, we see how his passion and understanding of football continue to drive him long after retirement.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 5
programme.desc: One year on from the tragic death of Diogo Jota and his brother Andre in a car accident, this deeply emotional PL Stories show celebrates the life of one of football's most loved figures. Through interviews with friends, teammates and coaches from Portugal to the Premier League, we look back on Jota's journey, the impact he had on those around him, and the legacy he left behind both on and off the pitch.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: Soaring Seagulls' tells the incredible story of Brighton & Hove Albion; from the brink of collapse and years in the lower leagues to becoming one of the Premier League's smartest and most admired clubs. Featuring interviews with the key figures behind Brighton's rise, alongside celebrity fans who followed every twist along the way, this documentary charts a remarkable journey of survival, ambition and one of the greatest comebacks in modern football.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We spend the day with Julian Dicks as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League's toughest and most uncompromising defenders. Best known for his time at West Ham United, Dicks looks back on the highs, rivalries and intensity of football in the 1990s, as well as the reputation that made him a cult hero with fans. Now coaching at Chelmsford City, we see a different side to the former hardman as he passes on his experience to the next generation, while reflecting on the moment

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE FRENCH CONNECTION
programme.desc: A celebration of France's greatest football icons, featuring Thierry Henry, David Ginola, Robert Pires, Claude Makelele, Emmanuel Petit and many more.

programme.title: PL MASTERCLASS - EP 4
programme.desc: Some of the Premier League's biggest stars take us onto the pitch to discuss the techniques and thought processes that allow them to perform at the highest level. Featuring Brentford goalkeepers, Viktor Gyokeres, Callum Hudson-Odoi and Lucas Bergvall.

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 24 FEB
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 27, as Brighton travel to Brentford, Newcastle face Manchester City in Manchester, and Everton host Manchester United in Monday night's game.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 1
programme.desc: We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League's fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe's elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining moments of his career, including spells with West Ham, Newcastle and Birmingham. He also opens up about the terrifying plane incident in 1998 that near

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 5
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Featuring Rodri, Viktor Gyökeres, Chris Wood and Daniel Munoz.

programme.title: FS MMA Arkadiusz Wrzosek vs. Ivan Vitasovic
programme.desc: This episode of FIGHT SPORTS MMA showcases action from KSW 90 with the main event with kickboxing standout, heavyweight Arkadiusz Wrzosek take on surging Croatian, Ivan Vitasovic who has won six straight fights.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams II
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a WBC middleweight title bout between Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (45-2, 24 KOs) and Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on November 20, 2010. This was a rematch from their first meeting a year ago where Williams won a controversial majority decis

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Joel Casamayor vs. Michael Katsidis
programme.desc: This episode features a lightweight title unification bout between Joel Casamayor and unbeaten Michael Katsidis, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the first ever Judo Grand Prix from Cancun, stop to get to know number 2 ranked fighter in the world Tal Flicker, and show a demonstration on how to execute one of Flicker's favorite submissions.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Arturo Gatti vs. Alfonso Gomez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Arturo Gatti facing off with Alfonso Gomez in what would be Gatti's final boxing match. Also on the card, Andre Berto takes on veteran Carlos Quintana on his way to stardom.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 2, from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan, features Terunofuji, Asanoyama, Takayasu and Wakatakakage.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Forms as well as Boy's Weapons and Men's Traditional Forms.

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 4 of 4.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 82
programme.desc: All of the Teletubbies are stuck. Tinky Winky's hand is stuck in the bag, Dipsy's hat is stuck, Laa-­Laa's ball is stuck and Po is stuck on the Tubby Slidey!

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 16
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'pumpkin', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. There is an orange pumpkin, a bumpy pumpkin and a pumpkin with lots of seeds. The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Messy wants to know how his goldfish friend can stay underwater for so long. He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 27
programme.desc: Preston left an egg sandwich out for too long, and now its explosive smell is stinking up the whole town. Mojo and Bo need to evacuate everyone in Swoppiton before the eggy 'stinkplosion'!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 6
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 5
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. Happy got a new bath sponge, Norrie is growing a sunflower and Roly, after thinking hard if he's got any news at all, remembers he's getting a new brother or sister. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 6
programme.desc: All the Squirrels are having a fine old time playing with the hose. All except one, poor Tag whose feet hurt. 'Why do my feet hurt?', he asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 28
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch has turned the Segovia Aqueduct into a giant water slide, by removing some of it's ancient stones to make it slope. But taking some of the perfectly balanced stones away means that the tall columns of the aqueduct are wobbling, and could come crashing down! The Go Jetters don't have long to stop Glitch and re-build the historic structure - Go Jetters, Go!

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 47
programme.desc: Bluey needs her Mum's advice on dealing with a troublesome neighbour, when the serenity of her couch cushion playhouse is threatened by Bingo's own growing stable of animals.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 50
programme.desc: Grandad is supposed to be resting, but when Bluey and Bingo go to visit him, he makes a run for it with the kids and takes them on a madcap adventure into the bush.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 18
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 19
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to Botswana, Africa and embark on a baby animal mission to help a meerkat family move home. Along the way, Andy meets some zebra and must race across an enormous salt pan to escape a hungry jackal.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Bella plays funny games with Lift using her colourful towel. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who uses a big towel to make up a new dance - the Butterfly Boogie!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 22
programme.desc: It's time for the summer fair. Eugene is the organiser, but it's so much work that he quits - he can't take the pressure. So it's up to the Squirrels and their friends to find a new leader.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 21
programme.desc: The squirrels have to solve the mystery of the missing red ruby.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 20
programme.desc: It's crazy golf time and the everyone has to make their own courses.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 33
programme.desc: The Go Jetters test their knowledge and teamwork in a tricky maze full of trials. But can they escape the labyrinth, beat Glitch's high score and still keep the team together?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 32
programme.desc: The team goes on a jungle expedition to find a mysterious creature. But while they race to discover a brand new species, something seems to be watching them from the treetops.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 23
programme.desc: Thomas and the steam trains spring into action when Porter and the diesel engines run into a series of accidents that throw their deliveries off track.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Stanley must deliver some parcels on the train but ends up delivering the wrong ones. After correcting his mistake, he has to muster the townsfolk to help stop his runaway train.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Stanley must track down the missing library book, 'The Little Book of New Things to Do'. He visits various townsfolk who have leant the book to each other.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: Invisibility, speed, electricity, and flight, the animals share all the exciting things they would do if they had magic powers.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S02 - EP 11
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran go swimming in a lido on a hot summer day. JoJo is excited to show Gran Gran what she has learnt in her recent swimming lessons, but when she loses her goggles, she isn't sure she can jump into the water!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 1
programme.desc: Bluey is excited to get her own room. But when bed time comes, she misses Bingo more than she expected and must find a way to stay in touch with her sister.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 2
programme.desc: Mum sets up a backyard obstacle course just for fun, but Dad wants to race! Now the kids are determined to win by any means necessary.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 51
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about an action hero called Jet Rocket who always saves the day by smashing and crashing things. But there are other ways to save the day!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 50
programme.desc: The Squirrels try and tell us what has just happened but are struggling to retell the story correctly.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: What goes up must come down! Grandmaster Glitch lands with a splash in Lake Titicaca in South America.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, Parsley sings a rock song.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Pepper performs a bell ringing act.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Chilli pretends he's a superskateboarder, but he can't really skate at all!

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: Evil Pea captures Supertato, but Carrot masters the ultimate flip kick and rescues her.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 83
programme.desc: The Teletubbies enjoy a game of 'What's your name?' Later, there's a surprise when a bowl of Tubby Custard joins in with the game!

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 17
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'squirrel', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different squirrels - grey, red and one with a very bushy tail. Some friends find scampering squirrels, we see a flying one and a supersquirrel wearing a cape! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Messy has a pair of yummy green socks waiting for him. He eats one, but where is the second? He visits OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 28
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo join the big cross-town race with plans to win. But how can they stay ahead when they have to keep stopping and swopping to help other racers in trouble?

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 6
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside, when out of a bush jumps the cutest creature they ever did see. They think it is simply adorable and tell it so... with startling results. The creature bursts into tears! The creature, whose name is Plinky, tells them her whole family are monsters, and that's what she's supposed to be, but she just cannot get the hang of it. The Squirrels are keen to help Plinky get in touch with her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. Happy got a new bath sponge, Norrie is growing a sunflower and Roly, after thinking hard if he's got any news at all, remembers he's getting a new brother or sister. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 29
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch wants to watch his favourite DVD in peace, so uses his remote control to pause the Rio Carnival in Brazil!

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 48
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Mum get into a debate with Dad about the definition of teasing. As they recall all the times where he's been a Big Teaser, Dad argues that he was only just playing.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 51
programme.desc: The Heelers gather for a classic Aussie Christmas. Bluey gets a new teddy and introduces him to the whole family, but the family play too rough with him and now he wants to go home, until Frisky convinces him to stay.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 19

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 17
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'squirrel', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different squirrels - grey, red and one with a very bushy tail. Some friends find scampering squirrels, we see a flying one and a supersquirrel wearing a cape! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 15

programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside, when out of a bush jumps the cutest creature they ever did see. They think it is simply adorable and tell it so... with startling results. The creature bursts into tears! The creature, whose name is Plinky, tells them her whole family are monsters, and that's what she's supposed to be, but she just cannot get the hang of it. The Squirrels are keen to help Plinky get in touch with her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.desc: Mum sets up a backyard obstacle course just for fun, but Dad wants to race! Now the kids are determined to win by any means necessary.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 4
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 52
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn the many ways you can walk with the help of friends and a catchy song.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 51
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about an action hero called Jet Rocket who always saves the day by smashing and crashing things. But there are other ways to save the day!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Glitch visits Rome to race his grimbots in the Colosseum. Can the Go Jetters stop him?

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the fastest woodwind player - Pear!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, Parsley sings a rock song.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: Evil Pea captures Supertato, but Carrot masters the ultimate flip kick and rescues her.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Evil Pea tricks Supertato by pretending to be his sidekick and captures him instead.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 84
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-­Laa and Po enjoy a game of musical statues. It takes the Teletubbies a few turns to work out what to do when the music stops; they must stand very still.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 18
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'chair', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see a brown, a comfy and a high chair, as well as a pushchair. We meet a friend who has a wheelchair and sit at the beach in some deck chairs. The journey is repeated with some surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Messy monster is having breakfast and sees little objects on the fridge. Why don't they fall off? He goes to OKIDO to find out!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 29
programme.desc: When a lost bird takes a liking to Bo, it is up to Mojo to fly it home. But it's a stormy trip, and Bo will need to do some flying of his own!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 9
programme.desc: The day starts when Duggee moves a cupboard, and the Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind it. It's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels aren't sure what a diary is, so Duggee explains by reading some extracts. The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside, when out of a bush jumps the cutest creature they ever did see. They think it is simply adorable and tell it so... with startling results. The creature bursts into tears! The creature, whose name is Plinky, tells them her whole family are monsters, and that's what she's supposed to be, but she just cannot get the hang of it. The Squirrels are keen to help Plinky get in touch with her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 30
programme.desc: Kyan wants to climb Mount Everest, but his daring plan is interrupted by Grandmaster Glitch, who's careering down the mountain in a giant snowball.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 49
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey to mind her manners at the table - they're not animals. But when Bluey gets her hands on a stick of magic asparagus, she shows them everyone's got a wild side.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 52
programme.desc: It's the night before Easter and Bluey and Bingo are worried the Easter bunny is going to forget about them like last year. Mum and Dad reassure the girls but when they wake up to no chocolate eggs, Bingo fears the worst. Luckily Bluey finds a series of clues and a treasure hunt throughout the house begins.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 20
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 21
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Andy, Jen & Scout head to Patagonia, in South America on a baby animal mission in search of mother puma and her four cubs.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It drops into the Ice Disco, giving Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee is making a smoothie and the Squirrels can't agree on whether it's delicious or horrible, so they make their own adventurous smoothies showcasing their favourite flavours to discover what taste is.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 23
programme.desc: The Squirrels are exploring in the attic when they find an old cassette tape, and decide to make a mixtape for Duggee to remind him of all the happy memories they've made while earning their badges.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 22
programme.desc: It's time for the summer fair. Eugene is the organiser, but it's so much work that he quits - he can't take the pressure. So it's up to the Squirrels and their friends to find a new leader.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Glitch finally pushes the Grimbots too far with his rudeness, prompting them to go on strike. Glitch seeks help from Kyan - but Kyan has his own problems, as he's worried about speaking in front of a crowd for his upcoming show and tell. Glitch thinks of a solution to both their problems: they'll travel to Barney Castle in Ireland, near where his Great Aunt Cliodhna lived, and find the Barney Stone. It is said to give the gift of the gab to all who kiss it, making them brilliant at talking to pe

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 34
programme.desc: Some fast-growing plants that don't belong on Academy Island are in danger of taking over. Can the Go Jetters stop the superweed from damaging the Academy and Grim HQ?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 2
programme.desc: Thomas befriends a stray dog who is wandering around the railway and tries to find him a home. In the process, Thomas derails and the fuzzy little dog raises the alarm.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 34
programme.desc: When Umbrella gets left on the bus, Sarah and Duck head to the bus depot in search of their friend.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Sarah is fascinated by some mysterious music coming from the hedge.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 10
programme.desc: Myrtle wants everyone to see her new dance so enlists Stanley to gather some friends. However, the stereo breaks so they have to make their own music.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: Stanley must teach his friends how to knit. They all knit so much they burst out the top of the community centre. Stanley repairs the roof with the groups knitting.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: Unicorns, dragons, mermen, and the tooth fairy! The little animals share their favourite magical creatures.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5) - EP 1
programme.desc: In 1698, Captain Kidd raids a ship on the high seas and seizes its treasure... but Kidd is hanged before revealing where he stashed it. What happened to Captain Kidd's lost booty... and where is it now?

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 13
programme.desc: The Allies undertake Operation Overlord, one of the most complicated and massive military invasions in history, to liberate Occupied France and open up a true second front in Western Europe.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 14
programme.desc: The Allies and Japan clash in the jungles and plains of Asia, the 'forgotten theater' of World War II, as America struggles to bring the fight to Tokyo's door.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII - EP 5
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos and his team make a discovery far older than they expected. Later, new evidence emerges suggesting that the team may have uncovered a long-lost battle at Target 4.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: Are modern-day pirates prowling the Bermuda Triangle in search of victims? The team takes on the twisted case of a missing boat called the Saba Bank lost in the vicinity of the Bermuda Triangle in 1974.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14) - EP 8
programme.desc: Troy attempts to run a record-breaking 100 lines alone. Ashley and Anna venture into a notoriously haunted swamp known as the Cemetery, while Black Rambo searches for a legendary vampire killing kit.

programme.desc: All over the world, there are places and objects that are thought to be cursed. Many people avoid these things, believing they will bring harm. Others think that curses are nothing but superstition.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15) - EP 13
programme.desc: As gator season enters the homestretch, Troy and Pickle chase a hook-breaking monster. Ashley uses a tip from the King of the Swamp to target a giant. Bruce puts it all on the line on his final day.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Monkey glands for immortality, hypnotised assassins, and a brain-linked cyborg couple. We investigate some of the strangest experiments on record. From two-headed dogs to testicle transplants...

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12) - EP 20
programme.desc: While digging a massive steel shaft in the Money Pit area, the Lagina brothers and their team make a discovery that could help prove the legends about buried treasure to be true.

programme.desc: Quawntay Adams gets caught up in a big marijuana bust and is sentenced to a long prison term. When he finds out he is going to be a father, he determines to break out of his maximum-security cell.

programme.desc: Forget the monsters under your bed. The real ones, from dinosaurs to mythic beasts, are out there just waiting to be unearthed.

programme.title: Alone (S12) - EP 2
programme.desc: Faced with skittish game and unfamiliar plants, the final group of survivalists quickly learn their earliest strategies will be met with unforgiving resistance.

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S10) - EP 14
programme.desc: In this special competition, two previous champions go head-to-head in a 5-hour forging round, making their own signature 'can mai' blades for the chance to compete against one of our titans of the forge.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4) - EP 46
programme.desc: A Milwaukee company experiments with something new. What starts as an unappealing low-calorie beer becomes the number one beer in America, sparking a battle between two titans for the crown of light beer.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4) - EP 47
programme.desc: Before juice was everywhere, these innovators created the most nostalgic drink products and thirst quenchers of the last century, leading the charge on a new billion-dollar beverage industry.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11) - EP 5
programme.desc: Further investigation has the fellowship suspecting multiple secretive operations took place on Lot 5, possibly related to the Garden Shaft.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11) - EP 6
programme.desc: After two years of waiting, the team receives the Muon topography data and learns that the cavity known as Aladdin's Cave may have more secrets to tell.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: A man is arrested for driving his golf cart while intoxicated and refuses a breathalyser test. A young man with LSD and hashish learns the hard way that hanging with underage girls is a very bad idea.

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 5
programme.desc: Kerry Lyn Dalton was sentenced to death for the torture and murder of Irene "Melanie" May. And because Melanie was a meth addict with no fixed address, police did little to investigate her disappearance.

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 6
programme.desc: Melissa Lucio was sentenced to death for the murder of her two-year-old daughter, Mariah, and in January 2022 she was given an official execution date of April 27, 2022.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers (S9) - EP 1
programme.desc: During Alaska’s summer solstice, Alaska State Troopers confront a fleeing suspect, defuse an armed barricade and investigate arson near the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Spellbound: Crimes Of The Mind
programme.desc: In Malaysia, crimes involving 'pukau' have led to robbery, fraud and even rape. But why were the victims so powerless? Could black magic be involved?

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: After a man and a woman are found shot, investigators struggle to find clues to catch the killer until a deputy locates the victim's car filled with guns, silencers, and a mysterious man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: When an otherwise healthy woman is admitted to the hospital with sudden organ failure, an anonymous tip leads authorities to investigate a pattern of deaths in her family and a shocking prime suspect.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson - EP 1
programme.desc: 18-year-old Nicole Brown meets 30-year-old OJ Simpson while working as a hostess, sparking a whirlwind romance. Despite appearing as the perfect wife and mother, Nicole endures OJ's abuse in private.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 10

programme.desc: January 5, 2016, Baltimore, MD. Police officers respond to a report of a deceased man found at the Deluxe Plaza Motel in Northeast Baltimore.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 5

programme.desc: A grieving father attacks his 3-year-old son's killer in court; a judge screams expletives at a disruptive member of the gallery; a wheelchair-ridden defendant runs for it before entering court; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5) - EP 137
programme.desc: A defendant announces college baseball scores during his murder trial; a man facing drug charges gets caught smoking marijuana in the virtual courtroom; a domestic violence suspect threatens a judge.

programme.desc: When an unidentified woman is found dead outside a Tulsa home, detectives must sift through murky details to figure out who she is and what happened to her.

programme.desc: In Mobile, a brazen gunman shoots another man in front of gas station security cameras, and in Gwinnett County, detectives race to identify a woman shot on the side of the road and track down her killer.

programme.title: The Mafia's Manager
programme.desc: Taiwanese police received a tip off that a mysterious manager in the Taiwanese mafia was getting on a flight to Jakarta. They had just 6 hours to identify him to their counterparts in Jakarta.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: Nick Davis investigates a local artist found murdered in his home. With very little evidence, Detective Davis methodically pursues every lead until a lucky break points him toward a surprise suspect.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Det. Walter Edmond responds to a homicide where a woman is found dead from multiple gunshot wounds, and a couple at the scene leads him to a suspect.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6) - EP 7
programme.desc: Dubbed 'the vampire killer,' teen Mathew Hardman thought that taking a life would make him immortal. His victim was an elderly neighbour. After stabbing her, he removed her heart and drank her blood.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6) - EP 1
programme.desc: A 68-year-old father shoots his daughter's boyfriend when the couple arrives at the family home. Believing his daughter is trapped in an abusive relationship, he fires three shots.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 13
programme.desc: Linda grew up in luxury, her parents' Miami mansion meticulously maintained by staff. As a young woman, she worked in high-end real estate and enjoyed the Miami social scene.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 14
programme.desc: After suffering traumatic losses, Linda's life took a drastic turn. Now, at 70, her once-elegant lifestyle has evolved into an existence surrounded by trash and decay.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: 20,000 Chinese children are kidnapped every year to feed a voracious baby trafficking industry. How did this happen? Who's behind it? And can anyone stop it?

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: No matter what you eat, at least one ingredient could have come from China. But with the country's thriving fake food industry, what you're eating could be poisoning you.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 10
programme.desc: The wife claims she has no memory of wounding him, but when the police investigate, she is charged with second-degree murder. Is she a murderous wife or a battered spouse?

programme.title: Gordon Buchanan: My Epic Camel Adventure S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan takes an epic camel ride across the Gobi Desert to discover how these most iconic, yet least understood, animals have adapted to survive in extreme environments.

programme.title: Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles S02 - EP 3
programme.desc: For his latest Railway Adventure Nick is in Romania, undertaking a journey he's dubbed 'The Transylvania Express'.

programme.title: Earth S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Chris Packham tells the miraculous story of how plant life turned Earth from a barren rock into a vibrant green world - a four-billion year saga of extraordinary highs and lows that almost wiped out all life on the planet. Beginning as a water world without land masses, a giant asteroid bombardment triggered Earth's plate tectonics, leading to huge fungi, soil and giant swamp forests. But the early plants locked so much carbon dioxide that global temperatures suddenly plunged.

programme.title: The Great Wall with Ash Dykes S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: This time Ash's Great Wall adventure begins in Henan Province searching for the origins of the Great Wall. Before seeking out the birthplace of Kung Fu at The Shaolin Temple. Ash then meets a wall protector in Chengziyu village who is passionate about preserving China's past. And finally, he'll take a dive into the underwater world of the wall at Panjiakou reservoir.

programme.title: The Mating Game S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: The strategies used by animals to find and defend their mates in the grasslands of Namibia, the Serengeti and Australia. Here, mating strategies are on show for all to see.

programme.desc: Chris Packham tells the miraculous story of how plant life turned Earth from a barren rock into a vibrant green world - a four-billion year saga of extraordinary highs and lows that almost wiped out all life on the planet. Beginning as a water world without land masses, a giant asteroid bombardment triggered Earth's plate tectonics, leading to huge fungi, soil and giant swamp forests. But the early plants locked so much carbon dioxide that global temperatures suddenly plunged.

programme.title: Paddy and Chris: Road Tripping S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Paddy and Chris head to Switzerland to explore its multi-million-pound wellness industry. The lads travel to one of the country's top wellness resorts for a full body MOT to assess how well they're ageing. After a consultation with specialists, they're put through a rigorous training programme that reveals their true biological ages, surprising them both. Paddy, also eager to address his thinning hair, travels to Zurich to a men-only clinic to explore available treatments.

programme.title: Into the Congo with Ben Fogle S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: On this second leg of his journey, Ben heads deeper into the vast Congo wilderness to fulfil his life-long dream of seeing wild gorillas. He discovers a region experiencing rapid change: logging roads have opened-up the rainforest and thousands of people are flooding in to seek their fortunes. It's a threat to traditional communities who rely on the rainforest - but also its stunning wildlife.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s “The Exchange” is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 106
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals why ancient Greece was the birthplace of so many big ideas. She decodes the Parthenon's geometry, sails the Aegean with ancient tools and is swept up in a riotous festival.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Hannah Fry journeys to Ireland, her ancestral homeland, tracing the impact of the nation's modern economic transformation and its connections to the land and sea.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 4

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Hannah Fry travels to Spain to decode its history and culture. She learns about the rhythms of flamenco, a mountain whistle language and the hidden symbolism in its urban planning.

programme.title: The Race to Build Data Centers in Space

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation. Our exclusive features, "Tackling China", "CBA Stories", and "Beyond the Baseline", take you behind the scenes and closer to the top athletes in China, by providing a unique perspective on the top sports stories

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 134
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Hidden Doors! Exploring the Unknown World "Capelin from Iceland" (R)
programme.desc: Aiba Masaki hosts a brand‑new overseas travel show like no other. He visits hidden places rarely introduced in Japanese media, guided by local residents, and also travels abroad to thank the people who make the everyday items we rely on. From stunning scenery and unique cuisine to surprising lifestyles and unexpected ties to Japan, the show uncovers the world’s hidden secrets.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 74
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 135
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: EMISSARY - EP 15
programme.desc: Jiang Dawei, an idealistic student turned police officer, goes undercover to infiltrate a drug lord's inner circle. As he gathers evidence, his personality drastically changes, causing rifts with loved ones. He endures isolation and hardship to fulfill his duty.

programme.title: Deadly Sins & What's On Today - EP 7
programme.desc: Exploring the darker side of human nature when desire spirals out of control, this drama revolves around the East New Territories Regional Crime Unit, which investigates a series of bizarre murder cases and uncovers shocking secrets.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2845
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Journey to Jianghu (SR.2)
programme.desc: As the saying goes, "Reading ten thousand books is not as good as traveling ten thousand miles." Wayne Lai and Mak Cheung-ching embark on another journey, continuing their exploration of the magnificent landscapes depicted in Jin Yong's novels and delving into the martial arts world of Chinese history. They travel along the Yangtze and Yellow River basins, traversing Sichuan, Zhejiang, Henan, and Shanxi provinces, climbing Mount Emei's Golden Summit, visiting Baidi City, the Yue Fei Temple in Zh

programme.title: Sword and Fairy 1 - EP 38
programme.desc: Adapted from game Chinese Paladin, the story follows Li Xiaoyao, a waiter with hero dreams, and Zhao Ling'er, a descendant of Nuwa. They face challenges in search of the Spirit Pearl, courageously embarking on a journey to save the world.

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 29
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

programme.title: My Unfair Lady - EP 5
programme.desc: Career driven LING MAN (Jessica Hester Hsuan) is a property management executive with a golden touch, and the shopping malls under her leadership have won many awards. She is also a control freak. As her number one assistant, her cousin LING YU-KEN (Natalie Tong) is totally under her thumb and hard-working. She learns to flirt superficially, helping LING MAN smooth over many problems. Just as LING MAN is looking forward to moving up the company to be appointed to the board of directors, the comp

programme.title: Communion - EP 13
programme.desc: After getting divorced, Au Yiu-cho (Kwok Chun On) and Tang Lai-kuen (Alice Chan) operate two restaurants coincidentally called Yuet Tak House in Hong Kong and on the mainland respectively. They never have issues with each other. In 2022, Lai-kuen abruptly returns to Hong Kong to open a branch. She even declares she wants to obtain the rights to the Yuet Tak House trademark through legal channels. The duo’s little son Au Ka-kin (Chow Ka Lok) signs up for Greater Bay Area Youth Entrepreneurship Co

programme.title: Guts of Man - EP 18
programme.desc: TUNG FEI (CHAN KIN FUNG, SAMMUL) ignores his late father’s last will and sneaks out of the Taohua Village, where he grew up, without his sister LAM’s (KOI MING FAI, JOYCE) knowing it. He meets a fisherman’s son SHEUNG FOON (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) on the way. He and FOON travel to the Qiantang River to see the tides. They meet a tycoon’s daughter YING HIU SUET (CHO, MANDY LEE) and FEI falls in love with her at first sight.

programme.title: Provocateur - EP 18
programme.desc: Following deaths of his first and second wife, cosmetic mogul CHEUK KWAN-LAM (Gallen Lo), who is left alone living with his step-daughter CHEUK MAN-LEI (Jacqueline Wong), tries to turn over a new leaf. As fate would have it, he encounters a resourceful young man called POON SIU-KIT (Fred Cheng), through whom he sees a younger version of himself, so he cannot help developing a kindly feeling for him. His secretary CHAN HEI-MAN (Ali Lee) also has a very high regard for SIU-KIT after he joins the c
